items.title: Pakistan struck a rehab centre and killed 269 Afghans. Their families want to know why
items.dek: There are calls to investigate the 16 March airstrike - which the UN says likely killed more - as a war crime.
items.body: There are calls to investigate the 16 March airstrike - which the UN says likely killed more - as a war crime.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Woolworths worker who was told to cover his ‘plumber’s crack’ has case dismissed
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: France seeks to move beyond colonial ties by meeting African leaders in Kenya
items.dek: In a first since these meetings started in the 1970s, this move reflects a change in France's thinking.
items.body: In a first since these meetings started in the 1970s, this move reflects a change in France's thinking.
